Package io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.types

Class ChzzkLiveDetail

java.lang.Object
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.types.ChzzkLiveInfo
io.github.bbobbogi.stream4j.chzzk.types.ChzzkLiveDetail
All Implemented Interfaces:
LiveInfo
public class ChzzkLiveDetail extends ChzzkLiveInfo
Class representing live detail information.
